executives.name: Anil Chakravarthy
executives.background: Mr. Chakravarthy has served as President, Digital Experience Business since January 2020. Prior to joining Adobe, he was Chief Executive Officer of Informatica LLC from 2016 to 2020.

tenure_dates.title: Various leadership roles, including Executive Vice President of Information Security, Senior Vice President of Enterprise Security Group, and Senior Vice President of Storage and Availability Management Group

executives.name: Brett Shirk
executives.background: Brett Shirk has served as our Chief Revenue Officer since February 2020. Prior to joining Fastly, Mr. Shirk served as Executive Vice President and Chief Revenue Officer of Rubrik, Inc., a cloud data management company, from January 2019 to February 2020.

executives.name: Chirantan "CJ" Desai
executives.background: Chirantan "CJ" Desai has served as our President and Chief Operating Officer since January 2023. He previously served as Chief Product and Engineering Officer from 2016 to 2023.

executives.name: Eric Brandt
executives.background: Mr. Brandt has been a director since 2011. He was Executive Vice President and CFO of Broadcom Corporation.

executives.name: Nora Denzel
executives.background: Former Interim CEO of Outerwall Inc. and former executive at Intuit and HP. Director since 2014.
